_note: Updated 2026-05-29 cycle AI overnight-triage. Critic participated tonight via the closing METRIC_INTEGRITY_PROTOCOL § 3.1 attestation AND a substantive independent verification. Tonight was a heartbeat-only cycle (FIQ + bug-reports inbox both ABSENT for the 69th consecutive cycle), so the three § 3.1 concrete questions resolve N/A by absence (verified by directory-absence checks, not waved off): no bug-report diagnoses to scrutinize, no proposals to challenge, no FIQ grades to audit. Cycle AI had a genuine NEGATIVE app-health movement (88.7 -> 87.7), and on a negative-movement night the easy spin runs the OTHER way from cycle AH: 'my heartbeat broke something' (false self-blame) OR 'nothing to see here' (waving off a real signal). The critic guarded against BOTH. Independent verification performed: the critic read the app-health data block verbatim and confirmed exactly ONE dimension moved (A12_operational 90->75, status green->yellow); A8_performance HELD at 83 (the cycle-AH perf gain sustained, NOT reversed); the 10 other dimensions byte-identical. CRITICAL nuance the critic insisted on: the A12 label shows skip-dirty count IMPROVED 5->4, yet the score DROPPED 90->75 — so the naive 'more skip-dirty = lower score' story is FALSE; the real driver is the PIPELINE STATUS flip green->yellow. The critic then demanded causation evidence and got it: approvals-pipeline.json status=yellow with summary 'watcher last run: skip-dirty · 1 in inbox', and the downloads-watcher log at 2026-05-29T16:00:48Z reading VERBATIM 'SKIP working tree dirty with non-routine files: before-auth-desktop-v8.23.25.png, src/styles/components.css'. The critic confirmed those dirty files belong to the CONCURRENT v8.23.26 ship (commit 6c2255b5) and NOT to the heartbeat — so the drop is concurrent-ship churn SURFACED by the regen, not CAUSED by it, and it self-heals once the ship's tree settles. The critic confirmed NOT authoring a fix/proposal was correct: the watcher skip-dirty is working as designed (a safety feature, not a defect), the drop is a self-healing transient, and manufacturing a proposal would be ship-count gaming. The critic also confirmed the commit used an explicit pathspec capturing ONLY this cycle's own files (NOT the concurrent churn: package.json/sw.js/utils.js/caddynotes.js/components.css/PNG) — index-race discipline. The critic actively guarded AGAINST both false self-blame and waving-off, rather than rubber-stamping. Critic token counter at ~116k cumulative since last rest (threshold crossed at cycle AH, first crossing; +~15k this cycle); status remains active and no rest triggered — heartbeat-only critic load is genuinely light per-cycle, consistent with how the engineer treats its long-crossed token threshold on these nights. Critic attests cleanly: substantive heartbeat cycle, ship closes.
